phase: Phase 17 - remaining feat backlog incorporation pass
sourceRepo: foundryvtt-swse-main (22).zip plus Phase 1-16 changed-file patches applied before this pass
policyNotes: Tech Specialist and Force Regimen Mastery remain deferred major UI/picker work.
Starship Designer and Cybernetic Surgery remain punted to GM/player handling.
Linguist remains treated as implemented through the chargen/progression language step.
Nearby allies, battlefield positioning, mounted positioning, soft cover targets, and Skill Challenge structures are kept as explicit metadata/manual table context rather than fake static automation.

This phase removes the remaining Phase 16 manual_or_unimplemented active backlog by either implementing engine-consumable rules, adding explicit metadata hooks, or reclassifying picker/table-heavy feats.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Dreadful Countenance
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Dreadful Countenance grants rerolls for Persuasion or Use the Force checks used for Fear effects; the reroll result must be kept.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Justice Seeker
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Justice Seeker adds +2 damage against targets that damaged one of your allies since the end of your last turn.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Wicked Strike
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Wicked Strike adds a once-per-turn second attack at -2 against another target within reach after damaging with a non-area Rapid Strike attack.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Crossfire
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Crossfire lets you attack the creature providing Soft Cover after missing the covered target with a ranged attack, once per round.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Imperial Military Training
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Imperial Military Training negates one Mind-Affecting effect affecting/targeting you once per encounter as a free action on your turn.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Disarming Charm
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Disarming Charm gives +2 circumstance to Deception or Persuasion checks against a target whose attitude you improved for 24 hours.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Momentum Strike
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Momentum Strike adds +1 weapon die to melee attacks while riding a mount or speeder bike if the mount/vehicle has already moved at least its speed this turn.

engineConsumableFeats.name: Grab Back
engineConsumableFeats.summary: Grab Back grants +2 Reflex against Grab/Grapple and lets you make a Grab/Grapple reaction when an enemy misses you with one.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Impersonate
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Impersonate enables Shapeshift-based impersonation as a Deception use; voice/appearance matching and specific-person disguise remain skill-use metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Destructive Force
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Destructive Force is a destruction rider: when an object/vehicle is reduced to 0 HP and damage equals/exceeds DT, adjacent targets take 1 die of the same damage type.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Maniacal Charge
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Maniacal Charge adds a free Intimidate/Persuasion rider while charging; successful checks suppress AoOs from passed enemies and deny the target Dexterity/flat-foot it until your next turn.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Blaster Barrage
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Blaster Barrage creates a +2 circumstance bonus for allies making Autofire attacks against targets you damaged with Autofire until your next turn.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Sith Military Training
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Sith Military Training is a once-per-encounter reaction when you drop a target or exceed DT, imposing -2 defenses on enemies within 6 squares of that target; range/target set remains context metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Leader of Droids
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Leader of Droids lets selected willing Droid allies benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects; effect propagation is explicit metadata/table-managed.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Distracting Droid
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Distracting Droid is a standard action Persuasion vs Will area effect against enemies within 6 squares that can see/hear you; success denies a move action, success by 10 also flat-foots.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Acrobatic Ally
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Acrobatic Ally is a coordinated movement stunt requiring adjacent ally, shared initiative, DC 20 Acrobatics, and positioning adjudication; kept as explicit action metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Mounted Defense
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Mounted Defense redirects one attack per encounter from you to your mount/speeder after the roll but before damage; mount/vehicle target handling remains reaction metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Fringe Benefits
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Fringe Benefits reduces Black Market cost multiplier by 2, minimum x1; store/black-market automation can consume this commerce metadata later.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: A Few Maneuvers
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: A Few Maneuvers grants +2 dodge Reflex to a Colossal-or-smaller vehicle you pilot and harmlessly self-destructs missile/torpedo misses by 5+; vehicle context remains metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Mon Calamari Shipwright
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Mon Calamari Shipwright reduces vehicle condition recovery to two swift actions and automatically succeeds on Reroute Power Mechanics checks.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Knock Heads
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Knock Heads is a Multi-Grab follow-up that deals 1d6 + Strength modifier bludgeoning damage to both grabbed adjacent targets and treats DT as 5 lower.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Coordinated Barrage
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Coordinated Barrage scales an aided ally attack by +1 die per 3 points over target Reflex, capped by aiding allies with the feat or +5 dice; ally-count handling remains table/context metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Hyperblazer
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Hyperblazer halves Hyperspace Tangle astrogation time/penalties and halves hyperspace mapping time; stored as Use Computer astrogation metadata.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Multi-Targeting
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Multi-Targeting lets a Droid spread Aim swift actions across rounds and attack other targets without losing Aim unless the aimed subject leaves line of sight.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Officer Candidacy Training
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Officer Candidacy Training grants +2 to Rank and Privilege Organization Score.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Tactical Genius
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Tactical Genius refreshes all spent Starship Maneuvers at the end of any round in which you roll a natural 20 on an attack roll.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Friends in Low Places
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Friends in Low Places substitutes Gather Information for Knowledge (Bureaucracy) for licenses and reduces Restricted/Military Black Market multipliers by 1.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Shield Surge
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Shield Surge lets a Droid/Cyborg with a vehicle data link trade remaining vehicle SR to reduce damage after shields are reduced.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Trample
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Trample lets a mount make a free natural weapon attack against each enemy whose square it charges through, plus the normal end-of-charge attack.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Meat Shield
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Meat Shield treats you as having cover from an opponent who attacks you while you have cover provided by another character/creature/droid.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Sensor Link
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Sensor Link broadcasts sensor input to an ally within 24 squares; mutual Sensor Link grants +2 Perception and otherwise enables Aid Another without line of sight.

metadataOnlyFeats.name: Brink of Death
metadataOnlyFeats.summary: Brink of Death lets you choose to reduce a target to 0 HP and unconscious instead of killing it when your attack would kill.

deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.name: Signature Device
deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.summary: Signature Device depends on Tech Specialist/customization trait selection and item designation, so it is deferred to the dedicated customization UI/picker work.

deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.name: Hasty Modification
deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.summary: Hasty Modification depends on Tech Specialist trait swapping and item modification UI, so it is deferred to the dedicated customization UI/picker work.

deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.name: Biotech Specialist
deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.summary: Biotech Specialist is a custom biotechnology modification system and needs dedicated modification UI/picker support rather than fake passive modifiers.

deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.name: Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap
deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.summary: Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap requires choosing a trained and untrained skill at runtime, so it is deferred to a small skill-swap picker rather than fake automation.

deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.name: Resilient Talent
deferredPickerOrMajorFeatureFeats.summary: Resilient Talent requires a once-per-day temporary talent picker from classes you have levels in, so it is deferred to dedicated picker/effect UI.

puntedOrTableManagedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Catastrophic Avoidance
puntedOrTableManagedFeats.summary: Skill Challenge: Catastrophic Avoidance reduces the frequency/severity of catastrophic failures; skill challenge resolution remains GM/table-managed.

puntedOrTableManagedFeats.name: Stand Tall
puntedOrTableManagedFeats.summary: Stand Tall is a nearby-ally reaction feat: once per encounter when you take damage, allies within 6 squares/LOS may attack the attacker. Nearby ally and LOS handling remains GM/table-managed.

puntedOrTableManagedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Last Resort
puntedOrTableManagedFeats.summary: Skill Challenge: Last Resort grants a reroll on a third failed Skill Challenge check, keeping the better result; skill challenge tracking remains GM/table-managed.

puntedOrTableManagedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Recovery
puntedOrTableManagedFeats.summary: Skill Challenge: Recovery treats a Skill Challenge as having the Recovery effect; skill challenge recovery structure remains GM/table-managed.
